questions.prompt:
An algorithm is required to keep asking the user for a password until the correct password is entered.

Write a Python program to:
  • prompt the user to enter a password
  • repeatedly take inputs until the user enters the correct password
  • output an appropriate message when the correct password is entered

For this exercise, the correct password is python123.
questions.explanation:
Format:
password = input('Enter password: ')
while password != 'python123':
    password = input('Enter password: ')
print('Access granted')
